_reactorNote: reactor = V3DutchOrderReactor on Base — VERIFIED 2026-07-10 three ways: SDK REACTOR_ADDRESS_MAPPING[8453][Dutch_V3], docs.uniswap.org/contracts/uniswapx/deployments, and the `reactor` field decoded from live Base Dutch_V3 orders (all agree). Priority reactor (0x0000…De729) is retired for this bot.
_executorNote: TODO(amit): the old executor (0x7acBe6…399e) is IMMUTABLY bound to the Priority reactor and cannot fill Dutch_V3. Deploy a fresh RyzeUniswapXExecutor bound to addresses.reactor (script/DeployExecutor, owner op — RUNBOOK §2), re-whitelist it on the Ryze router (setWhitelistedIntentSwapper, authority 0x0A2C…; pauseDirectSwap is ON), and set addresses.executor here. Shadow/quote use this as the eth_call `from` override; 0x0 is a harmless placeholder until deploy.

bandLimits.maxNotionalUsdWad: 18-dec USD cap per fill for this pool (OQ-5: tune to band-1 external liquidity)

strategy._gasEstimateNote: fork-fill measured 1.15M gas for a real 1-hop fill (Permit2 + reactor + oracle verify + swap); 1.3M adds headroom. 350k (old value) would out-of-gas every fill.
strategy._minProfitNote: = $0.10 — never fill break-even orders live; tune up from win data
strategy._inclusionFeeNote: Dutch_V3: the tx priority fee is a pure inclusion/gas-race knob (owed output is fixed by the decay curve, unlike Priority orders). 1 gwei; raise only to win inclusion races, never to change economics.

live._maxDecayWaitBlocksNote: Max blocks to wait for a non-exclusive order's exclusivity window to end (window closes at decayStartBlock). Audit: addressable curves span ~4 blocks (~8s on Base). Do not wait past a profitable point — a competitor takes it.
